# Copirate Cleanup Support - Examples

## Approval Summary Shape

```text
Cleanup findings ready for approval:
- Relocate: 6 files into planning/, analysis/, and debugging/
- Archive: 3 aged reports into archive/analysis-2026-04/
- Delete: 4 temporary files after confirmation
- Keep: 5 recent or reusable artifacts in place
```

## Closeout Summary Shape

```text
Cleanup complete.
Relocated 6 files, archived 3, deleted 4 approved temp files, and skipped 5 active artifacts.
One ambiguous working note remains in scratch/ pending user classification.
```
